  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

C1A_Rear_Side_Radar_Left_6.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 73D
Recv ID: 73E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 63
Func Name: SOW Left

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "Continental",
    "soft": "SW050000",
    "version": "REL2017SEP05"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "Continental",
    "soft": "SW060000",
    "version": "REL2018FEB05"
  }
]
